feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dump when running Transaction FR04
entry.content: We use Former Budgeting . We try to change the Orignal Budget for year 2024 by using Transaction FR04, and after posting we get a message that "Update was terminated", and the proram is "DUMPED".

entry.title: Archival configuration for site range in object MM_MATBEL
entry.content:
Hi,

I am archiving MSEG entries using object MM_MATBEL. Here the retention period can be maintain at site and transaction type. 

In my organization, business is creating/closing sites frequently and documents for these are not getting archiving.  

Is there any way where I can maintain the retention period for range of sites instead of individual sites or any other options to resolve this issue.

 

Thanks,

Sreenivasulu

entry.title: PP - Planning Calendars GR vs AVL Date
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, recently i had a request to activate the planning, Calendars. 

 

The original request is, how do I set up the MRP to receive the POs on specific days of the week??, for instance this list of materials I only want to receive it on Monday.

 

We set up the Planning Calendars and they are working fine, however we discovered that the requirements are align to the calendar but only the Availability date is aligned to the calendar, not the GR Date.

 

(The Calendar in the example the period is only Monday) 

 

if I check it against the calendar everything is matching to Monday. (Except one day, but is because Monday is a holiday, so it is moving it to the next day) 

 

However, if I change the view to display the GR Date, the GR Date is simply AV-GR days in the material master. 

 

Are you aware of a method to consider the GR not the availability date using the planning calendar? 

 

This is the current set up of the lot size used in the example.

 

An easy change would be to remove the GR time and add it to the plan delivery time, however they want to keep the GR time. 

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Enhancement for transaction VK12
entry.content:
Hi All,

I Create a implicit Enhance at the end of
FORM RV13A_KSCHL_SCHNELL in INCLUDE MV13AF0R,
I want to set the value of field KBSTAT as blocked when conditions change.

I successfully set the field, but normally when KBSTAT is set,
KRFST should also be set, but it is not.

Please Help me! Thanks All !

Best regards,

entry.title: need suggetion for upgrade HANA version
entry.content:
Hi experts,

  We are using S4HANA ON PREMISE SAP S/4HANA 1809 and datebase  2.00.037.07.1595989006 ( fa/hana2sp03 ) , detail can be found in the screenshot. Currently, we are experiencing the issue mentioned in  NOTE 0002940750 - Column Store DML Statements Waiting for DeltaDataObjectAppendRollover Lock. It seems the better solution is to upgrade HANA database version to 2.054.00 (SPS05) or higher. 

  Our concern here is that the current version of HANA has already reached SPS07, with many versions in between. Which version would be the best choice or the most stable option for us this time? Additionally, if we only upgrade the database without upgrading S/4HANA, will there be any compatibility issues? We hope the experts can provide some advice.

  Thank you very much.

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: SAP ECC compliance with XMLv2 revision 14 for SWIFT Alliance Lite2
entry.content:
Dear Team  ,

  I need help on how to change SWIFT message generation format in  SAP ECC to comply the new XMLv2 revision 14  .This is meet an urgent regulatory requirement  .Please assist relevant process or SAP note(s) .

entry.title: Connect ABAP system to SAP Web Dispatcher
entry.content:
We want to connect our ABAP Production system to SAP Web Dispatcher.

Please suggest some note so that we can connect our production system to SAP Web Dispatcher.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Script layout changes not reflected in print preview
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When ever we try to change with SPACES,TEXT FIELDS,BINDINGS in SAP Script, That layout changes have been reflected from development client to testing client through SCC1N.

Then execute the test print preview in SE71 it's working fine but execution with driver program(Z-Tcode) it's not reflected in print preview/print/spool.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Oracle linux/OS upgrade
entry.content:
Hello team,

ALL our sap systems are on AWS with oracle database and oracle linux 7.x. since support is getting expired this year end, we would like to have some recommendations from you; 

  1. what is the best/recommended approach for upgrade --> in-place or out-of-place/fresh install
  2. Any SAP notes/documentation referring to oracle linux upgrade?
  3. Do you recommend any technical procedure for the same. 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PO release strategy does not showing tick icon
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently doing some testing for PO release strategy. There is some discrepancy whereas some released PO does not showing right tick under status column. Is there any configuration that actually need to be done?

entry.title: Verification of information about users.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We need to extract information about whether users were created, changed or deleted in the databases of SAP environments.
How is it possible to extract this information from the database?

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change the Technical Administrator (TA) in Partner Demo Environment (PDE)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have successfully ordered and used the Partner Demo Environment (PDE), but I want to change the Technical Administrator due to the user being no longer active. I have requested to the support team but still no reply, and I am having a hard time looking for the configuration page. Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: Multiple System Status' but usually 4 are displayed
entry.content: If there are multiple System Status', say for an Insp. Lot(QA03),  how does the system determine which status'  to display(as a short text). There's not enough room on the System status line for all to be displayed so what's the logic for what does get displayed?

entry.title: in which table we will maintain customer wise threshold
entry.content:
Threshold amount for the fiscal year 2024-25 can be maintained with 5.000.000,00 in the maintenance view J_1IG_THLDV.

in which table we will maintain customer wise threshold.

entry.title: How to Plan Bom item before FERT for MTO scenario
entry.content:
I want to plan the bill of materials first for the MTO scenario, Please suggest possible solutions
issue:- We create the sales order for FERT (MTO) and run MRP which passes the dependent requirement to the bill of materials. We are not following scheduling here, moreover, the business wants to stop fert planning before raw material gets produced in-house. How we can pass the the requirement to bill of materials and not to FERT in MTO scenario where we have already sales orders created based on customer requirements? I know we have many options in MTS like 50 and 70, but I am specifically looking for a MTO scenario.

entry.title: QA33 NO LAYOUTS FOUND
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When I try to run the QA33 program a custom layout comes automatically and I get an error message called no layouts found. 

I know there is no such a layout among my layouts, may it come from custom code, but I want to use a standard layout here all the time to charm away this problem. 

Do you have any idea about how can I delete the layout pointed out below from all users (And how can I be sure it will not come back)? 

Waiting for your kind responses.

entry.title: Create/Update listing exclusion in ECC using PRICAT Inbound IDOC
entry.content:
Requirement is to get listing/exclusion maintained automatically in system, upon receiving PRICAT IDOC in SAP ECC system.

Kindly help if its achievable in standard and please share related Notes/Link/steps to do it.

Thanks!

entry.title: Modify Ship-to-party's address during sales order change
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have got a requirement where to modify ship-to-party's address in sales order header.

During order creation or change, user can change the address manually. This has to be verified using an external API call and correct address has to be updated.

Can anyone provide any user exits or any modification option at code level to achieve this.

Thanks

SAP ERP SD (Sales and Distribution) #Enhancement #user exits #badi

entry.title: Repitative Manufacturing(REM) Master data_Planning_Prduction confirmation
entry.content:
REM Master Data and Planning

Repetitive manufacturing (REM) needs below mentioned mandatory master data for
Repetitive manufacturing process.
1. Material Master data
2. Production Version
3. BOM
4. Rate routing.
5. REM Profile
6. Product Cost collector

Production version is combination of BOM and Rate routing. This maintained in
MRP4 view of material master.
REM Profile need to configure if need and maintain that in MRP4 of Material master.
Finish Material and sub-assemblies should have BOM (Bill of material) and Rate Routing.

Product cost collector is cost Object in REM manufacturing Process. Planned order is final receipt which will not convert to production order. All activity cost, material consumption cost will settle in product cost collector.

Finish material should have demand either customer or planned independent requirement (PIR). Based on those demand, MRP will generate Planned order with order type “PE” are also called as Run schedule.

If sub-assemblies are with Procurement type E, REM Profile and Production version, then MRP generate Run schedule for those also.

Before Manufacturing confirmation, Cost of materials should estimate and released.

Cost of Product cost collector should also estimate.

Manufacturing execution:

 

Quantity and activity could confirm based on business process.

When quantity of Finish material/Sub-assemblies confirmed, this reduces planned order quantity of those materials and that of dependent material also.

During manufacturing confirmation, BOM could explode, and components could consume automatically based on setting in REM profile.

If materials are linked with Non-HU (Handling unit) storage location, then those could be confirmed through transaction MFBF.

If Finish Materials are linked with HU (Handling Unit) storage location, then production confirmation could happen with reference to Handling Unit in transaction MFHU.

Quantity linked to Handling unit will confirm.

After manufacturing confirmation, Planned order qty reduced from 5 to 1.

 

 

 

 

 

That run schedule creates dependent requirements for all BOM components which are production relevant.

 

Planning could run at Plant level through MD01 transaction. Planning could also run at material level through MD02.
